subcodes.first_line: O servant of Baha! Praise be to God that thou hast been delivered from the bitterness of the Great City and hast hastened unto Iran [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء الحمد لله از مرارت مدینه کبیره رهاای یافتی و بایران شتافتی جناب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
